en.title: Robotics · Factory-Grade EM Twin & Wireless Reliability

fields.Headline: Keep Every Robot on the Floor "Communicating Reliably"
fields.Sub: AGVs, AMRs, collaborative robots, and automated production lines depend on wireless more deeply than ever, yet metal reflections, human-vehicle interference, and production cycle times impose extreme reliability requirements on 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 / TSN links. MetaRadio delivers factory-grade ray tracing, robotics communication HIL, and a factory EM twin across three product layers, so wireless is no longer the link on the production line that "lives at the mercy of the weather."

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · Robotics & Smart Factory

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: Industry Vertical Market Solution

items.title: Headline
items.text: Keep Every Robot on the Floor "Communicating Reliably"

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: Factory-Grade EM Twin & Wireless Reliability

items.title: Sub
items.text: AGVs, AMRs, collaborative robots, and automated production lines depend on wireless more deeply than ever, yet metal reflections, human-vehicle interference, and production cycle times impose extreme reliability requirements on 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 / TSN links. MetaRadio delivers factory-grade ray tracing, robotics communication HIL, and a factory EM twin across three product layers, so wireless is no longer the link on the production line that "lives at the mercy of the weather."

sections.label: The Hidden Bottleneck of Factory Wireless
sections.heading: Challenge · The Hidden Bottleneck of Factory Wireless

fields.Title: The Seemingly Stable Plant Wireless Hides Plenty of Latent Faults
fields.Description: Metal, moving equipment, and transient interference inside the factory make 5G LAN / Wi-Fi / TSN links far harder than in an office environment. One second of robot downtime is lost capacity, and the problem often cannot be reproduced on site.

table.Title: Metal Reflections
table.Text: Metal equipment and plant structures cause strong multipath and deep fading, leaving traditional coverage maps overly optimistic.

table.Title: Robot Coordination
table.Text: Concurrent interference and spectrum conflicts when multiple AGVs/AMRs operate at once are especially complex to model.

table.Title: URLLC Latency
table.Text: Collaborative robots and visual servoing demand millisecond latency, yet statistical models cannot deliver deterministic KPIs.

sections.label: Deploying the Three Product Layers in the Factory
sections.heading: Solution · Deploying the Three Product Layers in the Factory

fields.Title: "Load" the Factory into an EM Twin and Make Wireless as Controllable as Power
fields.Description: Lauraycs precisely simulates the wireless channel within BIM/IFC factory models, L2 runs HIL regression on robot communication modules under production cycle times, and L3 forms a factory EM twin integrated with MES / digital factory.

table.Description: Factory BIM/3D modeling + AGV/AMR trajectories + joint multi-AP/base-station, outputting time-varying 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 channels.
Production-line channels drive a 5G LAN / Wi-Fi 7 module test bench, regressing URLLC latency, packet loss, and roaming handover.
A factory EM twin linked with the factory digital twin / MES, monitoring coverage and bottleneck zones.

table.Title: Factory Modeling
table.Desc: BIM/IFC plant model + equipment layout + robot trajectories and cycle times.

table.Title: Channel & Coverage
table.Desc: The RT engine simulates multipath, coverage, and transient interference under production cycle times.

table.Title: Robot HIL
table.Desc: Channels drive robot communication modules to validate URLLC, roaming, and coordination.

table.Title: Factory Twin
table.Desc: Real-time EM twin + MES data, outputting bottlenecks and optimization recommendations.

table.Spec: 3GPP 5G LAN / URLLC, Wi-Fi 6/7, IEEE 802.1 TSN, IEC/ISA industrial bus
2.4 / 5 / 6 / 7 GHz Wi-Fi, 2.6 / 3.5 / 4.9 / 26 GHz 5G, dedicated industrial bands
Discrete manufacturing, continuous manufacturing, logistics warehousing, cleanrooms, ports, mines
Time-varying CIR/PDP, coverage maps, concurrent interference, roaming handover sequences
AGV, AMR, collaborative robot, gantry robot, robotic arm, AGC
5G module, Wi-Fi 7 module, TSN endpoint, PLC gateway, MES edge
End-to-end latency (including tail latency), packet loss, roaming success rate, time-synchronization accuracy
Already supports mainstream factory digital-twin platforms and MES data interfaces
Factory private cloud + edge; can be deployed isolated from the OT network

fields.Metal reflection modeling: The EM parameter library for typical factory materials is calibrated, avoiding overly optimistic coverage maps.
fields.Cycle-synchronized simulation: RT time-varying simulation refreshes by production cycle, aligned with the production-line rhythm.
fields.True URLLC latency: Outputs end-to-end KPIs including tail latency, not just averages.
fields.Multi-protocol joint: Joint simulation of 5G LAN + Wi-Fi 7 + TSN in the same scenario.
fields.MES/industrial twin integration: Connects with mainstream factory digital-twin platforms; the EM layer is ready to use out of the box.
fields.Domestic and controllable: Forms a validation ecosystem with domestic 5G LAN equipment / Wi-Fi 7 APs.

items.title: Metal reflection modeling
items.text: The EM parameter library for typical factory materials is calibrated, avoiding overly optimistic coverage maps.

items.title: Cycle-synchronized simulation

items.text: Outputs end-to-end KPIs including tail latency, not just averages.

items.title: Multi-protocol joint
items.text: Joint simulation of 5G LAN + Wi-Fi 7 + TSN in the same scenario.

items.title: MES/industrial twin integration
items.text: Connects with mainstream factory digital-twin platforms; the EM layer is ready to use out of the box.

items.title: Domestic and controllable
items.text: Forms a validation ecosystem with domestic 5G LAN equipment / Wi-Fi 7 APs.

table.Title: AGV Scheduling
table.Text: Wi-Fi/5G roaming reliability under large-scale concurrent AGV scheduling.

table.Title: Collaborative Robots
table.Text: End-to-end validation of URLLC latency for visual servoing / remote teaching.

table.Title: Warehousing & Logistics
table.Text: Joint RFID / Wi-Fi 7 / 5G coverage and inventory counting in high-bay warehouses.

table.Title: Cleanrooms
table.Text: Low-power IoT and high-reliability communication in semiconductor/pharmaceutical cleanroom environments.

table.Title: Ports
table.Text: Remote driving and platooning control links for port cranes / IGVs.

table.Title: Mines
table.Text: 5G private-network coverage and equipment coordination in complex underground/open-pit environments.

table.Label: Deployment cases at leading domestic automotive/electronics/logistics factories
Working with domestic industrial wireless equipment vendors

zh-CN.title: 机器人 · 工厂级电磁孪生与无线可靠性

fields.Badge: Vertical Datasheet · 机器人 / Robotics & Smart Factory
fields.Eyebrow: 行业垂直市场解决方案
fields.Headline: 让车间的每一台机器人都"通信稳定"
fields.Headline-em: 工厂级电磁孪生与无线可靠性
fields.Sub: AGV、AMR、协作机器人、自动产线对无线的依赖越来越深，但金属反射、人车干扰、产线节拍对 5G LAN/Wi-Fi 7/TSN 链路提出极高的可靠性要求。乾径以三层产品提供工厂级射线跟踪、机器人通信 HIL 与工厂电磁孪生，让无线不再是产线"看天吃饭"的环节。

items.title: Badge
items.text: Vertical Datasheet · 机器人 / Robotics & Smart Factory

items.title: Eyebrow
items.text: 行业垂直市场解决方案

items.title: Headline
items.text: 让车间的每一台机器人都"通信稳定"

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 工厂级电磁孪生与无线可靠性

items.title: Sub
items.text: AGV、AMR、协作机器人、自动产线对无线的依赖越来越深，但金属反射、人车干扰、产线节拍对 5G LAN/Wi-Fi 7/TSN 链路提出极高的可靠性要求。乾径以三层产品提供工厂级射线跟踪、机器人通信 HIL 与工厂电磁孪生，让无线不再是产线"看天吃饭"的环节。

table.Label: 毫秒级时延 KPI 验证

sections.label: 工厂无线的隐性瓶颈
sections.heading: Challenge · 工厂无线的隐性瓶颈

fields.Title: 看似稳定的厂区无线，藏着大量隐性故障
fields.Description: 工厂内的金属、运动设备、瞬时干扰让 5G LAN/Wi-Fi/TSN 链路远比办公环境更难。机器人停顿一秒就是产能损失，而问题往往无法在现场重现。

table.Title: 金属反射
table.Text: 金属设备和厂房结构带来强多径与深衰落，传统覆盖图过于乐观。

table.Title: 机器人协同
table.Text: 多 AGV/AMR 同时工作时的并发干扰与频谱冲突，建模尤其复杂。

table.Title: URLLC 时延
table.Text: 协作机器人/视觉伺服需要毫秒级时延，统计模型给不出确定性 KPI。

sections.label: 三层产品在工厂的部署
sections.heading: Solution · 三层产品在工厂的部署

fields.Title: 把工厂"装"进电磁孪生，让无线像电力一样可控
fields.Description: Lauraycs 在 BIM/IFC 工厂模型中精确仿真无线信道，L2 在产线节拍下对机器人通信模组做 HIL 回归，L3 形成工厂电磁孪生与 MES/数字工厂集成。

table.Description: 工厂 BIM/3D 建模 + AGV/AMR 轨迹 + 多 AP/基站联合，输出时变 5G LAN/Wi-Fi 7 信道。
产线信道驱动 5G LAN/Wi-Fi 7 模组测试台，回归 URLLC 时延、丢包、漫游切换。
与工厂数字孪生/MES 联动的工厂电磁孪生，监控覆盖与瓶颈区域。

table.Title: 工厂建模
table.Desc: BIM/IFC 厂房模型 + 设备布局 + 机器人轨迹与节拍。

table.Title: 信道与覆盖
table.Desc: RT 引擎仿真生产节拍下的多径、覆盖与瞬时干扰。

table.Title: 机器人 HIL
table.Desc: 信道驱动机器人通信模组，验证 URLLC、漫游与协同。

table.Title: 工厂孪生
table.Desc: 实时电磁孪生 + MES 数据，输出瓶颈与优化建议。

table.规格: 3GPP 5G LAN / URLLC、Wi-Fi 6/7、IEEE 802.1 TSN、IEC/ISA 工业总线
离散制造、连续制造、物流仓储、洁净车间、港口、矿山
时变 CIR/PDP、覆盖图、并发干扰、漫游切换序列
AGV、AMR、协作机器人、桁架机器人、机械臂、AGC
5G 模组、Wi-Fi 7 模组、TSN 终端、PLC 网关、MES 边缘
端到端时延（含尾时延）、丢包、漫游成功率、时间同步精度
已支持主流工厂数字孪生平台与 MES 数据接口
工厂私有云 + 边缘；可与 OT 网络隔离部署

fields.金属反射建模: 工厂典型材料的电磁参数库已校准，避免覆盖图过于乐观。
fields.节拍同步仿真: RT 时变仿真按生产节拍刷新，与产线节奏对齐。
fields.URLLC 真实时延: 输出含尾时延的端到端 KPI，而非仅平均值。
fields.多协议联合: 5G LAN + Wi-Fi 7 + TSN 同场景联合仿真。
fields.MES/工业孪生集成: 与工厂主流数字孪生平台对接，电磁层即装即用。
fields.国产可控: 与国产 5G LAN 设备/Wi-Fi 7 AP 形成验证生态。

table.Title: AGV 调度
table.Text: 大规模 AGV 并发调度下的 Wi-Fi/5G 漫游可靠性。

table.Title: 协作机器人
table.Text: 视觉伺服/远程示教对 URLLC 时延的端到端验证。

table.Title: 仓储物流
table.Text: 高架仓库的 RFID/Wi-Fi 7/5G 联合覆盖与盘点。

table.Title: 洁净车间
table.Text: 半导体/医药洁净环境下的低功耗 IoT 与高可靠通信。

table.Title: 港口
table.Text: 港机/IGV 的远程驾驶与编队控制链路。

table.Title: 矿山
table.Text: 井下/露天复杂环境的 5G 专网覆盖与设备协同。

table.Label: 国内汽车/电子/物流头部工厂落地案例
5G LAN + Wi-Fi 7 + TSN 联合验证
配合国产工业无线设备厂家
